历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 48452 → 68486 → 111339 → 61604 → 74582. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (111339th), in 2024 a significant forward shift back to 61604th, and in 2025 another backward shift to 74582nd, showing drastic fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is approximately 74582nd. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 52 in 2024, 90 in 2025, and 97 in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, compared to 2025, the expansion is about 7.8%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings between 127 and 163, overall stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no records of A- or above disciplines, so its disciplinary advantages are not prominent, limiting its appeal for applications. The university did not appear in reputation records from 2021 to 2026, indicating a stable reputation with no major public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 72nd overall, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. No record of application cutoff gaps or anomalies.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. Computer Science has high social popularity and is highly recommended, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering is highly recommended, and Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is divided with a wait-and-see approach. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (approximately 357,675). Based on recent proportions, Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 379,600, an increase of about 46% from 2025 (260,587), significantly intensifying competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Jiangsu Province, so Jiangsu examinees have relatively weak willingness to apply across provinces, and geographical preference exerts downward pressure on rankings (ranking numbers increase).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the backward trend in 2025 rankings, continued enrollment expansion in 2026 (about 7.8%), a significant increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (about 46%), stable reputation with no highlights, unremarkable disciplinary advantages, and remote geography, intensified competition is the main driving force. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 74,582. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 78,143, with a range of 77,643 to 78,643.
